news-global-econ.title: Chris Robinson, Bruce Springsteen face backlash as 'Americans have had enough' of being lectured: expert
news-global-econ.description: PR experts say the backlash against Chris Robinson and Bruce Springsteen reflects growing fan fatigue with political lectures at live concerts.

news-global-econ.title: Ben Sasse claims public schools were created to separate Catholic kids from parents, priests
news-global-econ.description: Former Sen. Ben Sasse says American public schools were designed to separate Catholic children from their parents and priests during a Trinity Forum event.

news-global-econ.title: Why America’s next 250 years can be greater than its first 250
news-global-econ.description: America's 250th anniversary recalls how George Washington's troops survived the Battle of Brooklyn in 1776 and how patriots persevered through centuries.

news-global-econ.title: World Series champion John Smoltz warns baseball 'will suffer' if ABS system is applied to all pitches
news-global-econ.description: Hall of Famer John Smoltz said he likes the ABS challenge system but is urging MLB to not make automated strike zones full-time in baseball.

news-global-econ.title: NATO's eastern flank races to rearm as Trump pressure exposes Western Europe's defense gap
news-global-econ.description: Eastern European NATO allies closest to Russia are spending the most on defense, while Western Europe faces pressure to meet the alliance's 5% GDP goal.

news-global-soc.title: Americans travel to Pakistan to free Christians trapped in modern-day slavery: 'God's hand was in it'
news-global-soc.description: Aaron Hutchings says he was shocked to see children making bricks under the hot sun in Pakistan to pay off family debts that had accumulated over generations.

news-global-soc.title: 22-Year-Old Penn State Student Fatally Shot During Alleged Robbery
news-global-soc.description:
A 22-year-old Penn State University student was fatally shot during an alleged robbery about 1:30 a.m. Saturday in Philadelphia.
The post 22-Year-Old Penn State Student Fatally Shot During Alleged Robbery appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.description:
Fort Worth police are seeking a suspect dressed in “all black” after four people were shot around 9:10 p.m. Saturday night, according to CBS News. The shooting occurred in Historic Stop Six Park and left a child, elderly woman, and police

news-global-soc.title: Android fake call detection warns you about scams
news-global-soc.description: Android's new fake call detection feature warns users when scammers spoof trusted contacts' numbers and use AI voice tools to impersonate loved ones.

news-global-soc.title: Presbyterian Church faces internal revolt after proposing clergy must be in monogamous relationships
news-global-soc.description: The Presbyterian Church (U.S.A.) faces backlash after a proposed rule requiring clergy monogamy sparked outrage from progressive committees.
